notes: Specs extracted from Facebook/Meta Ads Guide video section (Facebook Feed placement). The source URL provided is for the image guide page but content covers video format. Primary text recommendation is 50-150 characters. Video settings: H.264 compression, square pixels, fixed frame rate, progressive scan and stereo AAC audio at 128kbps+. Minimum width and height: 120 pixels. Max file size 4GB converted to 4096MB. Max duration 241 minutes converted to 14460 seconds. Note: for Awareness objective or certain performance goals, headline, description and CTA button won't display on Facebook Feed mobile.
